handoff.handoffNotes: Task 7.1 fully validated and passing. Both fixes implemented correctly: (1) AppShell background changed to gray-900, (2) Settings page now has complete theme selector UI with Light/Dark/System options. All 8 Task 7.1 tests passed, all 12 Task 7 regression tests passed. Build successful, no console errors. Implementation quality excellent with proper accessibility, TypeScript types, and responsive design.
